mapper.select: SELECT ac.id, ac.tenant_code, t.tenant_name, ac.app_id, ac.notify_url, ac.return_url, ac.sign_type, ac.charset, ac.is_prod, ac.sort, ac.create_time, ac.create_by, ac.update_time, ac.update_by, ac.remark, ac.version FROM pay_alipay_config ac INNER JOIN auth_tenant t ON t.tenant_code = ac.tenant_code WHERE ac.`status` = 1 AND t.`status` = 1 AND ac.tenant_code = #{tenantCode} AND ac.app_id = #{appId} ORDER BY ac.id DESC
